svg.text: RSD LSU + L1D Optimized Pipeline — LSU Checks + Opt C Prefetcher + Opt D Way Predictor
LSU forwarding / replay / ordering logic is shown inside the same cache-coupled memory pipeline
fresh demand load or LRB replay enters here
retrying probe holds this slot for one extra cycle
② D$TAG — Tag Compare + Misprediction Detect (MemoryTagAccessStage)
addr/rd_en in D$ADDR · tag_out in D$TAG
addr in D$ADDR · data_out in D$TAG · way-mux in D$DATA
read other way's tag next cycle
Tag port also shared with prefetch probes (§3.5) — see prefetch block on the right.
source select: SQ forward / D$ hit way / MSHR / IO
byte shift + sign/zero extend by access size
demand miss: prefetch_flag=0 · prefetch hit here: drop
load-triggered only · low priority · no stream buffer in v1
drop: store / uncachable / non-memory / same-line MSHR
drop: both MSHRs busy / queue full / own-miss alias
dequeue only when D$ read-side slot is idle
tag miss + free MSHR -> prefetch alloc
tag miss + no free MSHR -> drop in v1
prefetch tag probe -> Tag port (low priority)
prefetch fill -> normal D$ refill path
other way hit : flip bit for set_idx
MSHR fills : write fill_way to set_idx
MSHR ↔ external memory bus (shared with ICache)
prefetch fills indistinguishable from demand fills at this layer
